title: Building Interactive UIs in VS Code with MCP Apps — Marlene Mhangami & Liam Hampton, GitHub
summary: An MCP-based approach enables VS Code to render interactive HTML UIs directly inside the chat window as sandboxed iframes. The tool bundles data with HTML resource references, fetches and renders them in VS Code chat, and supports bidirectional updates through server callbacks. Applications like Shopify and Excalidraw use this pattern for checkout flows and architecture diagrams.
